turns.content: I told my friend clearly: I'm not available on weekends for work calls. That's my boundary and I need him to respect it.
That's a clear boundary. How did he respond?
He pushed back, said it was urgent. I said I understood but the answer is still no. Urgent doesn't override my boundaries.
